final:
module counter_16bit (
    input wire obf_clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire load,
    input wire [15:0] load_value,
    output reg [15:0] count
);
    always @(posedge obf_clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 16'b0;
        end else if (load) begin
            count <= load_value;
        end else begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end
endmodule
